title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.240 - Filing of petition, proceedings
text:
452.240.  Filing of petition, proceedings. — The petition of a married person for any of the purposes before mentioned may be filed and the case heard and determined in the circuit court, and the like process and proceedings shall be had as in other civil suits triable before circuit judges.
(RSMo 1939 § 3382, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 2001 H.B. 537) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2995; 1919 § 7320; 1909 § 8301
